data.body: Per user request: revised fd84 so its ACs are AUTONOMOUSLY completable (no [operator-attested] tags remain). Environment has gh as JoeOakhartNava with repo+workflow scopes; pypi env exists but currently LACKS required-reviewers (has only a branch_policy rule). Revised the 2 operator ACs to: (1) demonstrate guards FIRE via gh workflow run on navapbc/rebar with non-main ref + version mismatch, confirming abort-before-publish via gh run view (no real publish; guards precede publish); (2) read+configure+verify the live pypi environment (required reviewers + main-only branch policy) via the admin GitHub API, recording before/after. Escalation kept as fallback only if a GitHub scope is denied. Updated What+Scope bullets too. fd84 will need re-review (material changed).
